content.text:
All 5 active tests pass. The test "should keep a live cell alive when it has exactly 3 live neighbors (survival)" passed immediately because the existing implementation already handles `neighbors === 3` in the survival condition (`return neighbors === 2 || neighbors === 3`).

No implementation changes were needed for this test. The current implementation in `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-14_20-48-46_game-of-life-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_sonnet-4-6-no-thinking/src/game-of-life.ts` correctly handles both survival cases (2 and 3 neighbors) that were demanded by previously passing tests.

Green Phase Complete:
**Implementation**: No changes required - the existing implementation already satisfies the test
**Result**: All 5 active tests pass (4 todo tests remain)
**Approach**: The test passed immediately because `neighbors === 3` was already part of the survival condition, which was a necessary consequence of implementing the previous survival test. No new code was needed.

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
